mapper.update: update member set userid = #{afterUserid} where userid = #{beforeUserid}
update member set username = #{afterUsername} where userid = #{userid}
update member set nickname = #{afterNickname} where userid = #{userid}
update member set email= #{afterEmail} where userid = #{userid}
update member set password= #{encodedAfterPassword} where userid = #{userid}
mapper.insert: insert into inquiry(userno, inquirytitle, inquirycontent, phonenumber) values(#{userno}, #{inquiryTitle}, #{inquiryContent}, #{phoneNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT inquiryno, userno, phonenumber, inquirytitle, inquirycontent, createdat, replycontent, repliedat, status FROM inquiry WHERE userno = #{userno} ORDER BY createdat DESC
mapper.update: update inquiry set replycontent = #{replyContent , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repliedat = sysdate, status = 'replied' where inquiryno = #{inquiryno , jdbcType=NUMERIC}
